_doc: Per-repo binding for CANON-DEVELOPMENT-PROCESS §5/§6, enforced by check-feature-docs.mjs. The canon prescribes the artifact ROLES; the concrete filenames are L3 (yours). Copy to tools/feature-docs.config.json and bind to your repo. Any section set to null is a conscious N-A (reported, never a failure). No config file at all → the gate is skipped by devkit-doctor.
